mapper.insert:
SELECT approvalDoc_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO approvalDoc ( docId, docTypeId, title, content, detailData, docStatus, writerEmpId, writerEmpName, writerDeptCode, writerDeptName, writerGradeCode, writerGradeName, regDate ) VALUES ( #{docId}, #{docTypeId}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detailData, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{docStatus}, #{writerEmpId}, #{writerEmpName}, #{writerDeptCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerDeptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerGradeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerGradeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO approvalLine ( lineId, docId, stepOrder, apprEmpId, apprEmpName, apprDeptCode, apprDeptName, apprGradeCode, apprGradeName, apprTypeCode, lineStatusCode ) VALUES ( approvalLine_seq.NEXTVAL, #{docId}, #{stepOrder}, #{apprEmpId}, #{apprEmpName}, #{apprDeptCode}, #{apprDeptName}, #{apprGradeCode}, #{apprGradeName}, 'APPROVER', 'PENDING' )
INSERT INTO approvalFile (fileId, docId, oriFilename, saveFilename, fileSize, regDate) VALUES (approvalFile_seq.NEXTVAL, #{docId}, #{oriFilename}, #{saveFilename}, #{fileSize}, SYSDATE)
